race.name: Demino Ski Marathon
race.tagline: Fifty kilometers on the frozen banks of the Volga — Russia's most prestigious citizen ski marathon, now suspended from the world stage but still drawing thousands to Rybinsk.

vitals.registration: Online registration via Russian ski federation platform
vitals.aid_stations: 4-5 stations with tea, sports drink, food

climate.description: Rybinsk sits on the Volga River in central Russia with a harsh continental climate. March brings the transition toward spring, but temperatures typically remain below freezing. Race day ranges from -15°C to 0°C. Reliable deep snowpack from the long Russian winter.
challenges: March sun can soften snow surfaces during afternoon
Continental cold snaps can bring temperatures below -20°C
Klister conditions possible in late March warm spells
Remote location complicates international travel logistics

course.primary: Rolling terrain through the Demino sports complex and surrounding Yaroslavl countryside near the Volga River. The course traverses birch and pine forest with open meadow sections. The Demino complex was built for international biathlon and cross-country competition, providing excellent trail infrastructure.
course.surface: Machine-groomed skating lanes on purpose-built competition trails
course.grooming: Strong grooming standard — Demino complex has competition-grade trail preparation equipment
features: Set in the Demino international sports complex near the Volga River
Purpose-built competition trails — wide, well-designed for mass starts
Russia's most prestigious citizen ski marathon
The Demino complex has hosted FIS World Cup events

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Strong domestic event with good infrastructure from the purpose-built Demino complex. The FIS-grade venue delivers excellent grooming and organization. Worldloppet suspension since 2022 severely limits international participation and draw. Deep competitive field from Russia's strong ski culture.

history.summary: Founded in 2007, the Demino Ski Marathon quickly established itself as Russia's premier citizen ski marathon. The event benefits from the Demino sports complex near Rybinsk, a purpose-built facility that has hosted FIS World Cup biathlon and cross-country events. The race joined the Worldloppet series, gaining international recognition and attracting foreign participants. However, the event's Worldloppet membership was suspended in 2022 following international sporting sanctions on Russia. The marathon continues as a domestic event, drawing approximately 2,500 participants from across Russia.
notable_facts: Worldloppet membership SUSPENDED since 2022 due to international sporting sanctions
The Demino complex has hosted FIS Biathlon World Cup events
Russia's most prestigious citizen ski marathon
Founded in 2007 — relatively young but grew rapidly
Rybinsk sits on the Volga River, Russia's longest waterway
The event continues domestically with strong Russian participation

videos.title: Demino Ski Marathon 2018 — Daniil Miasoedov
videos.description:
A great video from #deminoskimarathon
It was my third big cross-country skiing competition in season 2017-2018, and I got just one workout in a month preparing to 50 km marathon. Anyway, I challenged myself and it was a great pleasure for me to start the distance with the Olympic champions. 2 hours 27 minutes, top 10% out of more than 2000 athletes!
videos.curation_reason: Personal race recap from competitor who finished top 10% in the 50km marathon with Olympic champions.

videos.title: ROSTEC DEMINO SKI MARATHON Klimanovich Aleksey номер 660
ROSTEC DEMINO SKI MARATHON Matveychenko Sergey номер 728
Рыбинск-40. ГОРОД ГОТОВИТСЯ ВСТРЕТИТЬ МАРАФОНЦЕВ
videos.description: Рыбинск готовится к проведению большого спортивного события международного уровня. В начале марта в Демино пройдет XVII Ростех Деминский лыжный марафон. Он уже готов бить рекорды по количеству зарегистрировавшихся. Чтобы участники добрались до места стартов без опозданий, принято решение изменить график реверсивного движения по Волжскому мосту.
